Procurador da República — first-instance federal prosecutor (career entry for MPF). Source: Lei 13.316/2016 art. 2º; 85.7% of STF Minister teto. 2025 subsídio.
Procurador Regional da República — Federal Regional Prosecutor (TRF-level). Source: Lei 13.316/2016 art. 2º; 90.2% of STF Minister teto. 2025 subsídio.
Procurador do Trabalho — labor prosecutor, MPT. Source: Lei 13.316/2016 art. 2º; 90.2% of STF Minister teto. 2025 subsídio.
Procurador do Trabalho Substituto — entry-level labor prosecutor. Source: Lei 13.316/2016 art. 2º; 85.7% of STF Minister teto. 2025 subsídio.
Subprocurador-Geral da República — second-highest MPF rank (3rd-instance federal courts). Source: Lei 13.316/2016 art. 2º; 95% of STF Minister teto. 2025 subsídio.
Cabinet Minister — ₹50,000 ministerial + ₹1,00,000 MP salary + ₹10,000 sumptuary. Source: Salaries and Allowances of Ministers Act 1952 + MP Act. 2026 rate.
Deputy Minister — ₹30,000 ministerial + ₹1,00,000 MP salary + ₹10,000 sumptuary. Source: Salaries and Allowances of Ministers Act 1952. 2026 rate.
Deputy Speaker / Deputy Chairman of Rajya Sabha (pay parity with Governor). Source: Salary, Allowances and Pension of Officers of Parliament Act 1953. 2026 rate.
Governor of a State (28 states, 3 UTs). Source: Governors (Emoluments, Allowances, Privileges) Act 1982, amended 2018. 2026 rate.
Speaker of Lok Sabha (pay parity with Vice President per convention). Source: Salary, Allowances and Pension of Officers of Parliament Act 1953, amended 2018. 2026 rate.

Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha / Rajya Sabha) — base salary only; MPs also receive ₹70,000 constituency allowance + ₹60,000 office allowance monthly. Source: Salary, Allowances and Pension of Members of Parliament Act 1954, amended 2018. 2026 rate.
Prime Minister of India — ₹50,000 PM salary + ₹1,00,000 MP salary + ₹10,000 sumptuary. Source: Salaries and Allowances of Ministers Act 1952 + Salary/Allowances of MPs Act 1954. 2026 rate.
President of India. Source: President's Emoluments and Pension Act 1951, amended by Act 9 of 2018. 2026 rate.
Minister of State (MoS) — ₹40,000 ministerial + ₹1,00,000 MP salary + ₹10,000 sumptuary. Source: Salaries and Allowances of Ministers Act 1952. 2026 rate.
Vice President of India / Chairman of Rajya Sabha. Source: Vice President's Pension Act 1997, amended 2018. 2026 rate.
Chief Justice of India (CJI). Source: Supreme Court Judges (Salaries and Conditions of Service) Amendment Act 2018. 2026 rate.
Civil Judge (Junior Division) — judicial service entry (post-exam). Source: 2nd National Judicial Pay Commission. 2026 rate.
District Judge (Super Time Scale / senior) — entry-level cadre post-Shetty Commission (2022). Source: 2nd National Judicial Pay Commission (Justice Shetty Commission); state-implemented. 2026 rate.
Chief Justice of a High Court. Source: High Court Judges (Salaries and Conditions of Service) Amendment Act 2018. 2026 rate.
Judge of a High Court. Source: High Court Judges (Salaries and Conditions of Service) Amendment Act 2018. 2026 rate.
Judge of the Supreme Court of India. Source: Supreme Court Judges (Salaries and Conditions of Service) Amendment Act 2018. 2026 rate.

Captain (Army) / Lieutenant (Navy) / Flight Lieutenant (IAF) — L10B, typically 2+ years of service. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Chief of Defence Staff (CDS) — L18, pay parity with Cabinet Secretary. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Chief of Army Staff (COAS) / Chief of Naval Staff (CNS) / Chief of Air Staff (CAS) — L17. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Colonel (Army) / Captain IN (Navy) / Group Captain (IAF) — L13 (Time Scale / Selection). Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Havildar (Army) / Chief Petty Officer (Navy) / Sergeant (IAF) — L5. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (₹5,200/mo for JCOs/ORs) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.

Honorary Lieutenant (Army) / Hony Sub-Lt (Navy) / Hony Flying Officer (IAF) — L10, commissioned from JCO. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (₹5,200/mo for JCOs/ORs) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Lance Naik (Army) / Leading Seaman (Navy) / Leading Aircraftman (IAF) — L3. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (₹5,200/mo for JCOs/ORs) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.

Lieutenant (Army) / Sub-Lieutenant (Navy) / Flying Officer (IAF) — entry commissioned officer, L10. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Lieutenant Colonel (Army) / Commander (Navy) / Wing Commander (IAF) — L12A, 13+ years of service. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Lieutenant General / HAG (Army) / Vice Admiral / HAG (Navy) / Air Marshal / HAG (IAF) — L15. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Major (Army) / Lieutenant Commander (Navy) / Squadron Leader (IAF) — L11, 6+ years of service. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Major General (Army) / Rear Admiral (Navy) / Air Vice Marshal (IAF) — L14. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.

Naib Subedar (Army) / Master Chief PO 2nd Cl (Navy) / Junior Warrant Officer (IAF) — L6 (JCO). Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (₹5,200/mo for JCOs/ORs) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Naik (Army) / Petty Officer (Navy) / Corporal (IAF) — L4. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (₹5,200/mo for JCOs/ORs) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Sepoy (Army) / Seaman (Navy) / Aircraftman (IAF) — entry enlisted, L3. Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (₹5,200/mo for JCOs/ORs) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.

Subedar Major (Army) / Master CPO 1st Cl (Navy) / Master Warrant Officer (IAF) — L8 (senior JCO). Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (₹5,200/mo for JCOs/ORs) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Subedar (Army) / Master Chief PO 1st Cl (Navy) / Warrant Officer (IAF) — L7 (JCO). Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (₹5,200/mo for JCOs/ORs) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.
Vice Chief of Army Staff (VCOAS) / VCNS / VCAS — L17 (Apex Scale). Source: 7th CPC Defence Pay Matrix + Military Service Pay (MSP ₹15,500/mo) per MoD orders. 2026 rate.

헌법재판소장 (President of the Constitutional Court — pay parity with Chief Justice). Source: 헌법재판소법 제15조; pay parity with 대법원장. 2026 FY.
대법원장 (Chief Justice of the Supreme Court of Korea). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표. 2026 FY.
지방법원장 (Chief Judge of a District Court). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표. 2026 FY.
고등법원장 (Chief Judge of a High Court). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표 (법관 최고 호봉). 2026 FY.
판사 1호봉 (Judge, entry — after 사법연수원 or 로스쿨 appointment). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표 1호봉. 2026 FY.
고법·지법 부장판사 (Presiding Judge, High/District Court). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표 17호봉. 2026 FY.
대법관 (Supreme Court Justice). Source: 법관의 보수에 관한 법률 별표. 2026 FY.

俸點 (Pay Point) — Taiwan's unified pay scale. Each civil servant's rank (職等 grade × 級 step) maps to a 俸點 value from 160 (lowest entry) to 800 (top of 簡任 senior appointment). This page shows the full 俸點 → 月支數額 mapping published by DGPA. 委任 (Elementary Appointment) covers 職等 1-5; 薦任 (Recommended) covers 6-9; 簡任 (Designated) covers 10-14.

Judicial Salary Group 1.1 — President of the UK Supreme Court, Lord President of the Court of Session (Scotland), Lady Chief Justice of Northern Ireland, Master of the Rolls.
Judicial Salary Group 2 — Justices of the Supreme Court; Division Presidents (Family/King's Bench); Chancellor of the High Court; Senior President of Tribunals; Lord Justice Clerk (Scotland).
Judicial Salary Group 3 — Lords/Lady Justices of Appeal (England & Wales and Northern Ireland); Inner House Judges of the Court of Session (Scotland).

Judicial Salary Group 4 — Puisne Judges of the High Court (England & Wales and Northern Ireland); Outer House Judges of the Court of Session (Scotland); Vice-Chancellor of the County Palatine of Lancaster.

Judicial Salary Group 5 — Senior Circuit Judges; Chamber Presidents of First-tier Tribunals; Judge Advocate General; President of Employment Tribunals; Sheriffs Principal (Scotland); Senior District Judge (Chief Magistrate); Recorder of Liverpool/Manchester/Belfast.
Judicial Salary Group 5.1 — Senior Masters & Registrars (England & Wales); Upper Tribunal Judges; Social Security Commissioner (Northern Ireland); Deputy Chamber Presidents.

Judicial Salary Group 5.2 — Circuit Judges; Sheriffs (Scotland); Senior Judge of the Court of Protection; Regional Employment Judges; Senior Court Masters and Cost Judges; County Court Judges (Northern Ireland).
Judicial Salary Group 6 — Designated First-tier Tribunal Judges; Vice-Judge Advocate General; Regional Judges (Property Chamber); Presiding District Judge (Magistrates' Courts) Northern Ireland.

Judicial Salary Group 7 — District Judges (England & Wales, Northern Ireland); Employment Judges; Coroners (Northern Ireland); Assistant Judge Advocate General; First-tier Tribunal Judges; Summary Sheriffs (Scotland).
Judicial Salary Group 8 — Salaried (Regional) Medical Members of the First-tier Tribunal Social Entitlement Chamber.

Cabinet Minister (Secretary of State). Pay = MP + Cabinet Minister additional (£71,090). Note: Cabinet Ministers often forgo part of the additional salary by convention, so actual paid amount is typically around £159,000.
Government Chief Whip (also Parliamentary Secretary to the Treasury). Pay = MP + Chief Whip additional (£41,685).
Lord Chancellor / Secretary of State for Justice. Pay = MP + Lord Chancellor additional (£61,651).
Lord Speaker of the House of Lords, per Constitutional Reform Act 2005.
Leader of the House of Lords. Salary-only (Lords don't receive MP sessional indemnity — peers receive daily allowance).
Minister of State (senior junior minister). Pay = MP + Minister of State additional (£31,680).
Member of Parliament — sessional indemnity only (excluding any office-holder additional). Set annually by IPSA. £93,904 for 2025-26 (uplifted 5.5% from £91,346 in April 2025).
Leader of the Official Opposition. Pay = MP + Leader additional (£76,888).
Prime Minister of the United Kingdom. Pay = MP sessional indemnity (£93,904) + PM additional salary (£83,370) per Ministerial and other Salaries Act 1975.
Speaker of the House of Commons. Special statutory salary set by Ministerial and other Salaries Act 1975 s.1(1)(b).
Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State (PUSS). Pay = MP + PUSS additional (£23,712).
Permanent Secretary — Permanent Head of a ministerial department. Tier set centrally by the Cabinet Secretary; pay above the published ceiling requires Chief Secretary to the Treasury approval.
Permanent Secretary — Permanent Head of a ministerial department. Tier set centrally by the Cabinet Secretary; pay above the published ceiling requires Chief Secretary to the Treasury approval.

SCS Band 2 — Director. Heads a directorate within a department or an executive agency of moderate size.

SCS Band 3 — Director General. Heads a large directorate-general or leads a substantial group across a major department.
SCS Band 3 — Director General. Heads a large directorate-general or leads a substantial group across a major department.

Professor associado com agregação — associate professor with aggregation, top escalão, índice 285.
Professor associado / Professor auxiliar com agregação — associate or assistant professor with aggregation, top escalão, índice 260.
Professor auxiliar — assistant professor, top escalão, índice 245.
Professor catedrático — full professor, top escalão, índice 330.
Leitor — lecturer (non-career), top escalão, índice 155.
